title: Admin Tools
description: AdminCommands gives server OPs complete control with gamemode management, player utilities, chat moderation
body:
# Description
**AdminTools** _aka AdminCommands in packaging_ is a powerful plugin that provides server operators with a complete suite of moderation tools. It offers essential commands for player management, server administration, and chat control - all restricted to OPs only. Every message and setting is fully customizable through `config.yml`.

The plugin features **gamemode management**, **player utilities**, **chat moderation**, and advanced tools like **IP checking** and **player freezing**. Unique systems include building restrictions, and admin spy for monitoring private messages.

This all-in-one solution is perfect for server administrators who need organized, dependency-free moderation tools. _Java 17 or higher is required._

# Commands
- Sets player gamemode to survival 
  
```
/gm0 <player> (alias: /gms)
```
- Sets player gamemode to creative 
```
/gm1 <player> (alias: /gmc)
```
- Sets player gamemode to adventure
```
/gm2 <player> (alias: /gma)
```
- Sets player gamemode to spectator
```
/gm3 <player> (alias: /gmsp)
```
- Fully heals a player
```
/heal <player>
```
- Fully saturates a player
```
/feed
```
- Toggles flight for a player
```
/fly <player>
```
- Clears a player's chat (or all non-OPs if blank)
```
/cc <player> (alias: /clearchat)
```
- Forces a player to execute a command
```
/sudo <player> <command>
```
- Sets time to day (1000)
```
/day
```
- Sets time to night (13000)
```
/night
```
- Freezes a player
```
/freeze <player>
```
- Locks a player's inventory
```
/invlock <player>
```
- Shows a player's IP
```
/checkip <player>
```
- Send message to all moderators
```
/modmsg [message] (alias: /mm)
```
- Show a player's ping
```
/ping <player>
```
- Toggle building restrictions
```
/disablebuilding (alias: /db)
```
- List alternate accounts
```
/checkalts
```
- Enable lockdown mode
```
/lockdown (alias: /ld)
```
